gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/408)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/408)
text: قَالَ لَيْسَ لَكَ أَنْ تَتَّهِمَ مَنِ ائْتَمَنْتَهُ وَ لَا تَأْتَمِنَ الْخَائِنَ وَ قَدْ جَرَّبْتَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Haroun Bin Muslim, from Mas’ada Bin Sadaqa,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is not for you that you accuse the one you trust, nor trust a betrayer whom you have tried out yourself’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Harun ibn Muslim from Mas’adah ibn Sadaqah who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You cannot accuse one whom you trust and you must not trust a treacherous person when you have already tried him.’’’
